case_title: NANCY GHARIB et al VS. FIMA GELMAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-19-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF AUG-25-2016 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-17-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 FOR CONTINUED ORDER OF EXAMINATION. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS NANCY GHARIB & MICHAEL GHARIB, AND DEFENDANT FIMA GELMAN. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-17-2016 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO DEC-19-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR NANCY GHARIB; EXCEPT MICHAEL GHARIB NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT DEBTOR FIMA GELMAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-21-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-21-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT EXCEPT PLAINTIFF MICHAEL GHARIB WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 19, 2016 AT 11:00 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR AGREES TO PAY $1,000.00 AND JUDGMENT CREDITOR AGREES TO ACCEPT IN SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT SATISFIED. NO APPEARANCES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY GHARIB, NANCY GELMAN, FIMA
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO PLAINTIFF GHARIB, NANCY GHARIB, MICHAEL HEARING SET FOR JUN-23-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT GELMAN, FIMA HEARING SET FOR MAR-19-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-23-2016 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-25-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT EXCEPT PLAINTIFF MICHAEL GHARIB WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY PROOF OF SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GELMAN, FIMA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,507.65 FILED BY GHARIB, NANCY GHARIB, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT GELMAN, FIMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-06-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $35.00 - SERVED JUN-13-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GELMAN, FIMA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-06-2014 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO AUG-21-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT EXCEPT PLAINTIFF MICHAEL GHARIB WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT TODAYS HEARING. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-21-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GHARIB, NANCY GHARIB, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GELMAN, FIMA $6,507.65 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,617.65 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: JUN-14-2016 - FEE FOR SERVICE $110.00- AS TO DEFENDANT GELMAN, FIMA
